action.description: The action to take. Must be one of the enum values as a plain string.

message.description: Required for display_to_user, clarify_request, out_of_scope. The message to show the user.

bug_description.description: Required for call_patch_agent. The extracted/refined bug description.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0-1 for the classification decision.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of why this action was chosen.
